title: Netmeds is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netmeds is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
